items.label: T1
items.content:
A Sheet Name is the name that distinguishes this sheet from other signup sheets.  For example, if people are choosing tryout locations and times, an appropriate name might be: "Combs Field, Saturday, 1:30pm."
People looking at a list of Sheet Names should be able to see all the information they will need in order to select the correct sheet to sign up on.
